era: Trap. E=7 -- back-to-back with DoNormaal (175). FIRST TRAP. Genre Stage 100. Triple structural event. Physical intensity. v1.49.316.

location.formative: Seattle trap scene. The most commercially dominant genre entering the engine's local ecosystem. Genre import reshaped by local artists.

members.name: Maliibu Miitch
members.note: Seattle. Trap. Self-released. E=7 physical intensity. First trap in engine.

theory_nodes.concept: Back-to-back E=7 (175-176) -- unprecedented. DoNormaal (experimental intensity) + Maliibu Miitch (physical intensity). The energy curve holds its peak. E=7 can sustain.
examples: These Arms Are Snakes (125): E=7, post-hardcore.
Three E=7 in 176 degrees. Two consecutive. Energy sustains.
theory_nodes.description: Back-to-back E=7. Unprecedented. Energy sustains at peak.

genealogy.relationship: Maliibu Miitch at 176. Third E=7. Back-to-back with 175.

theory_nodes.concept: Genre Stage 100 -- the hundredth genre. Trap as the 100th is fitting: most commercially dominant genre, entering late at maximum force. 100 genres in 176 degrees = 0.57 genres/degree.
examples: Trap = most commercially dominant genre of 2010s-2020s.
Enters late (degree 176) but at maximum force (E=7).
theory_nodes.description: Genre Stage 100. Hundredth genre. Trap enters. Milestone of accumulation.

theory_nodes.concept: First Trap in the engine -- 808 bass, hi-hat patterns, hard snares, Auto-Tune, 130-170 BPM (half-time feel). Physical intensity. Body music. The most commercially dominant genre arrives.
examples: 808 bass: deep, sustained, physical. Felt more than heard.
Hi-hat patterns: rapid-fire triplets. Rhythmic signature.
theory_nodes.description: First Trap. Physical intensity. 808 bass. Hi-hat rolls. Body music.

genealogy.relationship: Maliibu Miitch at 176. Trap enters at E=7.

cross_references.relationship: BACK-TO-BACK E=7! Experimental intensity (175) + trap intensity (176). Consecutive E=7. Unprecedented. Energy sustains.
E=7 TRIO! Three E=7 in the engine. Post-hardcore (125), experimental (175), trap (176). Three modes of maximum intensity.
HIP-HOP ARC! Afrofuturist experimental (157) to trap physical (176). The full range of Seattle hip-hop documented.
HIP-HOP SPECTRUM! Versatile hustle E=6 (174) vs trap intensity E=7 (176). Different modes. Two degrees apart.
